text: I feel like I am walking through a place where ideas take shape in quiet solitude. The purple glow and neon lights evoke a sense of anticipation, as if I am on the verge of discovery or on the threshold of creative possibility. Passing the R+D sign, I am reminded of the ceaseless human drive to innovate and explore. I sense both isolation and potential here; I am both guest and witness to the incubation of new thoughts.
